The '''''Leveler''''' was a modified [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] that served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]].<ref name="SWR64" />

==Characteristics==
The ''Leveler'' was modified from the stock [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]. It was shorter than other ''Acclamator''s.<ref name="No Prisoners" /> It also did not have a flat ventral hull and was equipped with [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] for ship-to-ship combat. The ''Leveler'' was the first of its class to have a hangar bay, which was located on the underside of the ship,<ref name="SWR64" /> similar to later [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|warships]]. The ''Leveler'' also was equipped with experimental [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] sometime during [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="No Prisoners" />

==History==
The ''Leveler'' was constructed sometime during the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] after the success of the ''Acclamator''-class assault ships deployed at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]].<ref name="Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]''</ref> It was [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] throughout the war. After a few months of war, the ''Leveler'' was sent to the [[Kemla Yard]] for a refit. The ship was fitted with advanced concussion missiles and was tasked with testing these prototype systems. During the three-day shakedown cruise, Captain Pellaeon allowed [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone Captain]] [[Rex/Legends|CT-7567]], also known as "Rex", to bring aboard new [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] for acquaintance of their new class. After emerging in the [[Fath system]], Pellaeon's first [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Rumahn]] informed of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] fleet nearby. Pellaeon then took the ''Leveler'' in closer to investigate.<ref name="No Prisoners" />

It shipped the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Omega Squad]] off to [[Gaftikar]] to participate in the [[Battle of Gaftikar|overthrow]] of the local Separatist government.<ref name="RC:TC" /> The ship also participated in the Battle of [[JanFathal]] after a refit. During the [[Battle of JanFathal]], ''Leveler'' was tasked to rescue [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] spy [[Hallena Devis]].<ref name="No Prisoners" />

{{Ship-stub}}

The ship was part of a task force that [[Battle of Merson|fought]] at [[Merson]], and was driven off by superior [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces.<ref name="SWR64" />
